brain.hint: Company knowledge graph — teams, processes, tools and AI, with readiness insights.
brain.insBlockedDesc: High AI potential but not (fully) documented.
brain.insBusDesc: Critical processes resting on a single person.
brain.insComplianceDesc: High-risk (EU AI Act) or personal data hosted outside the EU.
brain.insNoGaps: No gaps — AI is in use everywhere it should be.
brain.insNoneDocFirst: None yet — document the candidates first.
brain.insQuickWinsDesc: High AI potential, fully documented, no AI yet.
brain.insSharedDesc: Used across several teams — consolidation candidates.
brain.insWhiteSpotsDesc: Processes with AI potential but no AI in use yet.
brain.noTeams: No organisation yet — add functions in the Process Manager.
brain.quadCap: AI potential × documentation · green = AI in use
brain.reportFoot: Generated offline from the NIJU ICHI knowledge graph (Company Brain).
config.importHint: Upload a filled English template (JSON). Set the language name (“__name”) and code (“__code”) inside the template.
config.importInvalid: The file is not a valid language template.
config.importNeedCode: Please set “__code” (e.g. fr) in the template.
config.importNeedName: Please set “__name” (e.g. Français) in the template.
config.title: Configuration
design.importInvalid: The file is not a valid design (niju.design).
design.raciLettersHint: Text shown inside the badge for each role type (default R/A/C/I).
detail.assignmentRaci: / assignment by R · A · C · I
detail.noDescription:
No descriptions captured for this step yet.
In edit mode, add blocks (R/A/C/I) under “Description”.
editor.descHint: One block per responsibility (R/A/C/I). In the text **…** highlights terms in bold.
editor.detailHint: Detail page of this process step. Switch step via the dropdown at the top of the header bar.
editor.footerHint: Free text bottom left in the footer (e.g. confidentiality note).
editor.headerHint: Top right corner (version/as-of are only in the footer).
editor.heading: Heading
editor.inputHint: A point written as “Text [Responsible]” creates a small extra line.
editor.label: Label
editor.logoNone: No logo selected yet — until then the company name is shown as text.
editor.noEditData: No data to edit. Load a JSON or create a new process.
editor.raciHintDetail: Click the matrix on the left in the preview to set R/A/C/I. Changes automatically appear 1:1 in the process overview too.
editor.raciHintOverview: The RACI matrix is edited directly in the preview: click a matrix cell and toggle R/A/C/I on/off. A cell can contain several letters.
editor.rolesHint: Roles are the rows of the RACI matrix.
editor.subtitle: Subtitle
editor.title: Title
editor.titleHint: Tip: “Main title – addition” is shown in two colours (hyphen with spaces).
html.failed:
The HTML page could not be created:

{err}
htmlBatch.intro: Choose which of the selected process files to export. One HTML file is created per process.
htmlBatch.none: No valid process files were found in the selection.
htmlBatch.title: HTML batch export
htmlBatch.writtenFolder: {n} HTML file(s) written to the chosen folder.
hub.comingText: The read-only viewer will be implemented in phase 5.
hub.dirHint: The process directory lies outside the modules (e.g. a shared network folder).
hub.selectHint: Select a process on the left to view it.
import.dialogIntro: Text fields extracted from the file. The category per field was suggested from its position — please review and correct via the dropdown if needed. Columns (steps) and rows (roles) are sorted by position; RACI cells are automatically assigned to the nearest column/row.
jpeg.badSize: Please enter valid width, height and DPI values.
jpeg.failed:
The image could not be created:

{err}
jpeg.intro: Set the pixel size and resolution. The current view (overview or step detail) is exported.
jpeg.title: Export as JPEG
launcher.brainDesc: Company knowledge graph — AI readiness, gaps and where AI is already in use.
launcher.builderDesc: Create and edit RACI process overviews.
launcher.managementDesc: Manage the process map and structure tree.
launcher.subtitle: Choose a module
lib.indexMissing: No index.json found — built a flat list from the folder.
lib.noDir: No directory chosen — showing the demo library.
map.empty: No boxes yet. Use “+ Add box”.
map.hubHint: Click a box to open the linked folder or process.
map.imageStyleHint: Sets the shape of the selected box — with no selection, adds a new box of that shape.
map.label: Label
map.noSelection: Select a box on the map, or add a new one.
mgmt.comingText: The process-map editor and structure tree will be implemented in phase 5.
mgmt.selectHint: Select a process on the left for a read-only preview.
mgmt.structureHint: Organise processes into folders. Process content is edited in the Process Builder.
msg.confirmLoadTemplate: Load a template? Unsaved changes to the current process will be lost.
msg.confirmNew: Create a new, empty process? Unsaved changes will be lost.
msg.decompressUnsupported: This browser cannot decompress compressed draw.io files. Please export uncompressed in draw.io under “Extras → Diagram” (or as .xml).
msg.jsonReadFailed:
The file could not be read (not valid JSON):

{err}
msg.noTextFields: No text fields were found in the file.
msg.notXml: The file is not a valid XML / draw.io diagram.
org.confirmDeleteWithChildren: Delete “{name}”? Its sub-entries move up one level.
org.empty: No functions or roles yet. Add one, or import them from the processes.
org.emptyChart: No functions yet — add functions in the list view.
org.hint: Central registry of all functions (departments) & roles. Renaming an entry here syncs the change across all processes.
org.importedNone: All process names are already in the registry.
org.loadInvalid: No organisation found in this file.
org.name: Name
org.syncDownloaded: {n} changed file(s) downloaded — replace the originals in the process folder.
org.syncWritten: {n} process(es) written to the chosen folder.
org.usedNone: Not used in any process yet
org.importParentUnresolved: Parent function "{p}" not found — set to top level.
org.importEncodingWarn: Possible encoding issue — please save the file as "CSV UTF-8" in Excel.
org.replaceConfirm: Replace the current organisation with the imported data?
org.importEmpty: The CSV file contains no valid data.
org.coverage: {used} of {total} in processes used · {white} white spot(s)
tree.confirmDeleteCluster: Delete folder “{name}”? Its processes move to Unsorted.
wsn.assessmentHint: Rate each process — these values feed the Brain’s AI-readiness insights (quick wins, white spots, bus factor).
wsn.toolsEmpty: No tools or AI agents yet. Add one above.
